name: breadcrumb
title: BTBreadcrumb
description: Compositional breadcrumb system with 7 building-block components. Compose BTBreadcrumb > BTBreadcrumbList > BTBreadcrumbItem > (BTBreadcrumbLink | BTBreadcrumbPage | BTBreadcrumbEllipsis) with BTBreadcrumbSeparator between items.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
/**
 * BTBreadcrumb — compositional breadcrumb root wrapper.
 * Figma: D node 681:10168.
 *
 * @example
 * ```vue
 * <BTBreadcrumb>
 *   <BTBreadcrumbList>
 *     <BTBreadcrumbItem>
 *       <BTBreadcrumbLink href="/home">Home</BTBreadcrumbLink>
 *     </BTBreadcrumbItem>
 *     <BTBreadcrumbSeparator />
 *     <BTBreadcrumbItem>
 *       <BTBreadcrumbPage>Detail</BTBreadcrumbPage>
 *     </BTBreadcrumbItem>
 *   </BTBreadcrumbList>
 * </BTBreadcrumb>
 * ```
 */
import './BTBreadcrumb.css';
import type { BTBreadcrumbProps } from './BTBreadcrumb.types';

withDefaults(defineProps<BTBreadcrumbProps>(), {});
</script>

<template>
  <nav class="bt-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
    <slot />
  </nav>
</template>
